task_completion.description: Verify the observatory location is set to Siding Spring (-31.2722, 149.0661).
task_completion.visual_evidence: KStars geographic location dialog or settings showing 'Siding Spring' or the specific coordinates: Latitude -31.2722 (or approx -31.27) and Longitude 149.0661 (or approx 149.06).
Ekos profile editor or INDI Control Panel showing 'indi_simulator_dome' as an active, running, or connected device.
Ekos Dome module or INDI Control Panel showing the 'Slaving', 'Autosync', or 'Slave to Telescope' checkbox or toggle actively checked/enabled.

task_completion.description: Verify synchronized azimuth telemetry for Sirius, Canopus, and Alpha Centauri is recorded in dome_sync_report.csv.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or spreadsheet showing 'dome_sync_report.csv' open, containing the names 'Sirius', 'Canopus', and 'Alpha Centauri' along with numerical azimuth values.

task_completion.description: Verify a screenshot of the slaving mechanism is saved to dome_slaved_evidence.png.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager showing 'dome_slaved_evidence.png' in the Documents folder, a screenshot tool saving the file to this path, or an image viewer displaying the captured screenshot of the Ekos dome slaving interface.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent interacted with the KStars/Ekos GUI to configure the dome and slew to targets.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars application open, with the agent clicking through menus, Ekos modules, or the sky map, rather than just writing a script to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Ensure the telemetry data was actually obtained from the simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen slewing the telescope to the targets in KStars and reading the azimuth values from the interface, not just inventing numbers in the CSV.

integrity.description: Ensure the evidence screenshot is a genuine capture of the slaving mechanism.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent should be seen using a screenshot tool to capture the Ekos dome slaving interface, rather than downloading an image or renaming a random text file to .png.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The observatory location must be set to Latitude -31.2722 and Longitude 149.0661. The target stars for telemetry are exactly: Sirius, Canopus, and Alpha Centauri. The output files must be located at /home/ga/Documents/dome_sync_report.csv and /home/ga/Documents/dome_slaved_evidence.png.
